Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

artifact.content_preview:
NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

extracted_tasks.text: Contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-001: Alice Tran to contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised delivery commitment in writing. Deadline: March 5, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-002: Bob Morrison to complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen. Deadline: March 17, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-003: Dave Chen to prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office. Deadline: March 12, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-004: Farida Osei to complete and distribute UAT test plan to all stakeholders for review. Deadline: March 10, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: AI-005: Carol Nguyen to conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering committee. Deadline: Mar

extracted_tasks.text: Assess refactoring effort for migration script relying on deprecated legacy-sync API endpoint
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: d) Technical Dependency: The current migration script relies on the deprecated "legacy-sync" API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1. Bob t

extracted_tasks.text: Initiate knowledge transfer plan immediately given Bob Morrison's role as sole AD migration expert
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: c) Resource Risk: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days. Knowledge transfer plan mus

extracted_tasks.text: Notify HR regarding Bob Morrison's potential departure
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: c) Resource Risk: ... Knowledge transfer plan must be initiated immediately given his role as the sole AD migration expert. HR to be notified.

Date: Wed, 4 Mar 2026 10:05:00 -0500

Hello team / Bonjour l'équipe,

ENGLISH SECTION:

This week's status update for NGIS Phase 3 is as follows:

Work completed:
- Active Directory migration for Site A (Gatineau) is 80% complete.
- Network topology diagrams updated to reflect revised switch placement.

artifact.content_preview:
NGIS PHASE 3 — WEEKLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 24 – March 3, 2026
Report Date: March 3, 2026
Project Manager: Alice Tran
Project ID: NGIS-P3-2024-001
Overall Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The NGIS Phase 3 data centre consolidation project continues to progress
according to plan. The team has completed the Active Directory migration
for the test environment and finalized network topology designs for Sites
B and C. No risks are identified at this time.

---

ACCOMPLISHMENT
